notes: The algorithm receives only an opaque two-arm canonical oracle and numerical resource caps; the two phase levels and stop rule are fixed internally.
Phase, history, scratch mask, durable mask, rank work, and active query control coexist in one exact statevector.
Every level-two oracle invocation is controlled by the coherent not-stopped flag and charged in the worst-case query ledger.
The direct scratch mask is copied to a durable output before complete reverse replay of both level kernels.
Exact-grid first-stop and second-stop fixtures must output the correct mask and clean; the exact tie and generic off-grid fixture must fail closed.
The branch-RMS value is a theorem target only, never counted as an executed saving or proved variable-time upper bound.
